log.prompt: Write a short greeting to an old friend.
log.response:
Dear [Friend],
I hope this message finds you well! It's been a while since we last spoke, but I couldn't help but think of you when I saw your name pop up in my contacts.
Life has certainly taken its toll on us both, hasn't it? But I am so glad that you're still as vibrant and full of spirit as ever. Your wisdom and guidance have been a constant source of comfort to me over the years, and now more than ever, I feel grateful for our friendship.
I can't wait to catch up with you soon! Maybe we could go on one of those long drives or just spend some time chatting over a cup of coffee (or tea, whichever is your preference).
Take care and keep shining that light on us all!
Warmest regards,
[Your Name]
